rulings.Case Title: REMBERTO SAINEZ TRUST C/O REMBERTO SAINEZ, TRUSTEE ET AL VS. SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Hearing On Administrative Writ
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 21, 2017, line 4. PETITIONERS REMBERTO SAINEZ TRUST C/O REMBERTO SAINEZ, TRUSTEE, ERIKA SILVA SAINEZ'S Motion For Hearing On Administrative Writ. DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden to show that there was prejudicial abuse of discretion in the Rent Board's decision, which found that (1) Alfredo Fausto-Suarez was not a tenant in occupancy, while Juan Hernadez, Julio Estrada and Moises Hernandez were tenants in occupancy within the meaning of regulation 1.21; (2) Regulation 6.14 did not authorize rent increase because the landlord did not establish that 6.14 notice has been properly served; and (3) that the landlord failed to establish that the master tenant Alfred Fausto Suarez no longer permanently resided at the premises within the meaning of Costa-Hawkins (distinguishing the requirements of Costa-Hawkins from the requirements of Regulation 1.21). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WETMORE /KNOBHILL PARTNERS LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY VS. TRA WETMORE LP A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 21, 2017, line 1. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction. DENIED. Plaintiff failed to sustain its burden and failed to show that no event of default as defined in paragraph 19 of the Deed of Trust occurred, e.g. 19.12. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BIANCA SLAVIERO VS. ASHLEY ORNANO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 21, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANTS ASHLEY ORNANO, ANTONIO SOLORZANO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEJANDRO C. RAMIREZ VS. DAWN RENEE ALVARENGA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 21, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT DAWN ALVARENGA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith either (1) requisite relationship between Plaintiff and Defendant supporting an cause of action for unlawful detainer; or (2) cause of action appropriate for removal of a squatter. =(501/REQ)
